codeReview.summary: The feature is correctly scoped and implemented: commit e5a8b86 adds only a package-level no-op `lint` script to `package.json`, which matches the existing `.factory/services.yaml` validator command and satisfies the feature's deterministic `bun run lint` requirement without affecting runtime behavior.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The compatibility-hardening worker skill still prescribes running the full `bun run test` baseline even for tiny validator-surface alignment tasks, but this feature appropriately proceeded after documenting an unrelated pre-existing timeout because the assigned behavior was limited to manifest/script alignment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: compatibility-hardening-worker SKILL.md step 8 requires `bun run test`; handoff skillFeedback marks `followedProcedure: false` and explains the feature only needed `bun run lint` plus `bun run typecheck` after a pre-existing timeout in `tests/invalid-params.test.ts`.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, handoff, skill guidance, and commit e5a8b86. The change cleanly aligns `package.json` with the declared no-op lint validator, introduces no unrelated behavior changes, and has no blocking issues.
